summary: Completed frontend testing of dashboard chart corrections, DRE scroll functionality, and export features. All requested UI improvements are properly implemented and functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard - Login and registration functionality working
Dashboard - Navigation sidebar with all menu items accessible
Dashboard - Month and year filters functional
Dashboard - 'Entradas x Saídas' chart with correct color implementation (green for Entradas #16a34a, red for Saídas #dc2626)
Dashboard - 'Saídas por Plano de Contas' pie chart compact design with lateral legend
Dashboard - 'Entradas por Plano de Contas' bar chart with different colors per bar
DRE - Page loads with proper hierarchical table structure
DRE - Excel and PDF export buttons present and clickable
DRE - Expand All and Collapse All functionality working
DRE - Color coding correct (cyan for revenues, red for costs, blue for percentages)
DRE - Export functions respect expansion state (verified in code)
Fluxo de Caixa - Page loads with daily cash flow table
Fluxo de Caixa - Period filter toggle button functional
Fluxo de Caixa - Start and end date fields present and working
Fluxo de Caixa - Excel and PDF export buttons present
Planejamento - Page loads with DRE category structure
Planejamento - Excel and PDF export buttons present and functional
